channel.title: Have an option of create directly an empty custom theme when `npx frontity create my-project`
channel.description:
# Description When creating a Frontity project, the CLI offers you 2 official themes for your frontity project but doesn't give the option of an empty package (to start creating your own theme)
# Possible solution Adding a third option which will ask you for the name of your theme and will create a package automatically

item.title: Have an option of create directly an empty custom theme when `npx frontity create my-project`
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Description

When creating a Frontity project, the CLI offers you 2 official themes for your frontity project but doesn’t give the option of an empty package (to start creating your own theme)

Possible solution

Adding a third option which will ask you for the name of your theme and will create a package automatically

Read full topic
item.source: Have an option of create directly an empty custom theme when `npx frontity create my-project`
